summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Nebraska State Patrol Violation Navigator app. All backend APIs working correctly with 1,597 violation records. Frontend UI fully functional with search, filters, AI search, and data display. No critical issues found.
passed_tests: API root endpoint (200 OK)
GET /violations returns 1,597 records as expected
Keyword search functionality (brake: 132, tire: 36, driver: 193, hazmat: 5 results)
Violation class filtering (Driver: 270, Vehicle: 687, Hazardous Materials: 569)
OOS filtering (Y: 513, N: 1084 results)
HazMat filtering (Y: 569, N: 1028 results)
Level III filtering (Y: 346, N: 1251 results)
Critical filtering (Y: 576, N: 1021 results)
Combined filters working (66 results for brake + Vehicle + OOS=Y)
Pagination functionality (Page 1/160 with 10 results per page)
GET /violations/filters returns 5 classes, 2 OOS values
GET /violations/stats returns correct totals (1597 total, 513 OOS, 569 HazMat)
AI smart search working with expanded terms (brake problems: 132, tire safety: 4, driver fatigue: 155, hazardous materials: 592 results)
Frontend dashboard loads correctly
Header displays correct stats (1,597 violations, 513 OOS)
Search bar functionality with keyword and AI modes
All filter controls working (dropdowns and toggles)
Active filter badges display and clear correctly
Violation table displays data with proper formatting
Regulatory Reference column prominent in navy blue
OOS badges show red 'OOS' for Y values
Class badges with appropriate colors
Pagination controls working (next/previous)
Upload dialog opens and closes correctly
Nebraska State Patrol blue/gold theme implemented correctly
